services.name: Part Manufacturing
services.shortDescription: Complete precision part manufacturing solutions using advanced CNC technology.
services.description: Our Part Manufacturing service delivers high-precision components using state-of-the-art CNC machinery. From prototype to production, we handle projects of all sizes with consistent quality and on-time delivery. This is supported by high precision measuring instruments and equipments.

Machining Facilities.name: Turning
Machining Facilities.description: Our facility has 6 Lathe machines of varying sizes. These help us make parts either miniature or larger in size, precisely.

Machining Facilities.name: Milling
Machining Facilities.description: Our milling machines are fitted with accurate DROs, these are a mix of heavy duty and regualr machines. With our special fixtures and specific tools, we can complete complex jobs with ease.

Machining Facilities.name: Drilling & Tapping
Machining Facilities.description: We have a set of drilling machines, automatic and manual, along with a radial drill machine, to tackle any drilling and tapping needs that might arise.

Machining Facilities.name: Wire Cutting
Machining Facilities.description: With a total of 3 wire cutting machines, we are able to make intricate components, using a 0.1mm wire, these parts are made with high precision.

Machining Facilities.name: VMC (Vertical Milling Center)
Machining Facilities.description: We have 2 VMCs, That are capable of handling complex jobs with high accuracy and in a shorter period of time, eliminating human error.

Machining Facilities.name: CNC Lathe
Machining Facilities.description: Our CNC lathe can handle any large batches of jobs that need to be made precisely, within a short time period, while mainting tight batch accuracies.

services.name: Machine Manufacturing
services.shortDescription: Custom machine design and manufacturing for industrial automation needs.
services.description: We design and manufacture custom industrial machines tailored to your specific production requirements. Our engineering team works closely with clients from concept to commissioning.

processes.name: Design, Drawing and Development
processes.description: Complete machine parts and assembly design and drawing using CAD/CAM softwares like AutoCAD and Solidworks with FEA analysis for optimal performance.

processes.name: Fabrication
processes.description: Precision fabrication of machine structures using quality materials and processes.

processes.name: Assembly
processes.description: Our trained team takes great care in the assembly line, making sure each part is well lubricated. Parts are manufactured keeping un mind, tight tolerances, which leads to smooth, hassle-free part and machine assembly. We make sure no dust and dirt gets in the main spinlde assemblies.

processes.name: Testing
processes.description: All components and machines are checked throughly, after and before assembly, to ensure all parameters are met and no part/machines leaves our facility unless it is okayed by our Qaultiy control team.

services.name: Maintenance & Support
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive maintenance services to keep your machines running at peak efficiency.
services.description: Our maintenance services ensure your machinery operates at optimal efficiency. We offer preventive maintenance programs, emergency repairs, and spare parts support.

processes.name: Preventive Maintenance
processes.description: Scheduled maintenance programs to prevent unexpected breakdowns and extend machine life.

processes.name: Breakdown Support
processes.description: Rapid response for emergency repairs to minimize production downtime.

processes.name: Spare Parts
processes.description: Genuine spare parts supply with inventory management support.

processes.name: Training
processes.description: Operator and maintenance training for your team.

facility.description: Our manufacturing facility is euipped with a large variey of machines, small to heavy duty, manual and CNC. Along with that, we have a clean, temperature controlled Quality control room, where we inspect components at various stages to ensure a high precsion, quality product, always.   .

Well-equipped tool room for fixtures and jigs
